Now Launching in the Philippines

One Tap Can
Save Lives

Unilert is a unified emergency platform that enables users to instantly report incidents and connect directly to appropriate authorities for faster response and life-saving assistance across all emergency services.

Get Started Now How It Works
Available 24/7
Faster Response
100% Secure
Scroll
Simple & Fast

Report Emergency
In 3 Easy Steps

Designed for speed and simplicity — because in an emergency, every second matters.

01

Open & Report

One-Tap SOS

In critical situations where you're alone with no witnesses, a single tap instantly sends your live location and initiates a call or video call directly to an emergency dispatcher — no typing, no delay.

Incident Reporting

Report incidents by type: Medical, Police, Fire, Road Accident, Missing Person, or Natural Disaster — with details sent directly to the right authority.

02

Smart Routing

Our system analyzes your incident type and location, then routes your alert to the nearest and most appropriate emergency authority in real time.

03

Authorities Respond

The right responders are dispatched immediately. Track their arrival live, receive updates, and stay connected until help arrives.

Try Unilert Now
Powerful Features

Everything You Need
For Emergency Response

Built with first responders and everyday users in mind — Unilert covers every scenario.

Real-Time GPS Tracking

Pinpoint your exact location automatically and share it with responders. No manual address entry — just tap and go.

Multi-Authority Routing

Intelligently routes your emergency to police, fire, medical, or disaster management based on incident type and proximity.

Live Video & Voice

Stream live video directly to dispatchers so responders arrive fully briefed and prepared for the situation.

Incident History

Access a full log of past incidents, response times, and outcomes — useful for follow-ups and insurance claims.

Emergency Contacts

Automatically notify your trusted contacts when you trigger an emergency alert, keeping loved ones informed.

Offline Mode

Even without internet, Unilert uses SMS fallback to ensure your distress signal always gets through.

Trusted Partners

Connected To
All Emergency
Authorities

Unilert is deeply integrated with national and local emergency services across the Philippines. When you report, the right authority is notified instantly — no middlemen, no delays.
